steps.done: Flattened the original PDF via Ghostscript (pdfimage24, 300 dpi) -> Pharmacogenomics (PGx) Panel - Amedix Inc-flatten-pdf.pdf (448 KB, 2 pages).

steps.title: Import PDF
steps.done: Uploaded the flattened PDF to the dashboard against reqform 'PGX - Amedix 2026'.
steps.note: Verified stored as Medical PDF (Type Reqform) on S3: top-virginia-05112023.s3.amazonaws.com/medicalform/Pharmacogenomics (PGx) Panel - Amedix Inc-flatten-pdf.pdf

steps.title: Create Form.io order services form
steps.done: Built and overwrote '[DEV] [AI] order services PGX Amedix' (22 components). Confirmed persisted + opened after fresh reload. Screenshot is the Preview Form (full height to Submit). Linked the form's schema URL into the ReqForm Metadata (order_form_link) and saved (no sync).
steps.note: Field list confirmed with user before build. Fields: Test Panel (required) + 8 conditional gene-parameter selectboxes + hidden aggregator; adverse-drug-reaction & family-history radios; medications datagrid (+ 'list attached?' flag); fixed fields Additional Clinical Context, Relevant Diagnosis (system-fed, required), Instructions; Submit. Excluded by EMR-prepopulation: patient/provider info, specimen, submission checklist, consent. Dropped by Medicare-only billing rule: all payment fields. ICD-10 (48 codes: 25 primary + 23 secondary) captured into flat routing map, not rendered. ReqForm Metadata set to {list_medication:[{Other}], order_form_link: https://dev-rce-dashboard.firebaseio.com/forms/-Ov8Vavs3tFMwv0oT6nU/schema.json}.

steps.title: Final confirm
steps.done: User confirmed the finished recform. Verified reqform, uploaded PDF (S3), and the saved/opened Form.io form.
